businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrée principale pour le métabolisme de base.
businessContext_i18n.es: Entrada principal para la Tasa Metabólica Basal.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Consult a healthcare professional before starting any diet or exercise program.

description.short: Calculate total daily energy expenditure (TDEE) to maintain weight.
description.long: Calculate total daily energy expenditure (TDEE) to maintain weight.

short_i18n.en: Calculate total daily energy expenditure (TDEE) to maintain weight.
short_i18n.tr: Mevcut kiloyu korumak için günlük alınması gereken toplam kaloriyi (TDEE) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den gesamten täglichen Energieverbrauch (TDEE) zur Gewichtserhaltung.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la dépense énergétique totale quotidienne (TDEE) pour maintenir le poids.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el gasto energético diario total (TDEE) para mantener el peso.
short_i18n.ar: احسب إجمالي إنفاق الطاقة اليومي (TDEE) للحفاظ على الوزن.

long_i18n.en: Calculate total daily energy expenditure (TDEE) to maintain weight.
long_i18n.tr: Mevcut kiloyu korumak için günlük alınması gereken toplam kaloriyi (TDEE) hesaplar.
long_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den gesamten täglichen Energieverbrauch (TDEE) zur Gewichtserhaltung.

long_i18n.es: Calcular el gasto energético diario total (TDEE) para mantener el peso.
long_i18n.ar: احسب إجمالي إنفاق الطاقة اليومي (TDEE) للحفاظ على الوزن.
